featureSections.title: Keep Your Business Running Smoothly
featureSections.body: Downtime costs money. Our commercial electricians provide fast, reliable service for offices, retail spaces, and industrial facilities, minimizing disruption to your operations.
featureSections.cardBody: We understand urgent needs. Same-day service available for critical issues.

servicesPage.intro: We offer a full range of electrical services for residential and commercial clients in Dallas. Every job is performed by licensed, experienced electricians who prioritize safety and quality.

services.title: Electrical Panel Upgrades
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your electrical panel for increased safety, capacity, and modern appliance compatibility.
services.longDescription: Your electrical panel is the heart of your home's electrical system. If it's outdated or overloaded, you risk flickering lights, tripped breakers, and even fire. We replace old fuse boxes and panels with modern, safe units that handle today's power demands. Our licensed electricians ensure a smooth upgrade that meets all code requirements.
benefits: Eliminate tripped breakers and flickering lights
Support for modern appliances and electronics
Increased home safety and insurance compliance

process.title: Inspection & Assessment
process.description: We evaluate your current panel, load requirements, and wiring to recommend the right upgrade.

process.title: Permit & Planning
process.description: We handle all necessary permits and plan the installation to minimize downtime.

process.title: Professional Installation
process.description: Our electricians install the new panel, test all circuits, and ensure everything operates safely.

faqs.question: How do I know if I need a panel upgrade?
faqs.answer: Common signs: frequent breaker trips, buzzing sounds, old fuse box, or if you're adding major appliances like an EV charger or AC unit.

faqs.question: How long does a panel upgrade take?
faqs.answer: Most residential upgrades take 4-8 hours. We'll provide a specific timeline during your estimate.

services.title: Whole-Home Rewiring
services.shortDescription: Complete rewiring for older homes to ensure safety, reliability, and modern electrical capacity.
services.longDescription: Homes built before 1980 often have outdated wiring that can't handle today's electrical loads and may pose fire hazards. Our whole-home rewiring service replaces all old wiring, outlets, and switches with modern, code-compliant materials. We work carefully to minimize wall damage and restore your home to pristine condition.
benefits: Eliminates fire hazards from old or damaged wiring
Peace of mind with a fully updated system

process.title: Full Home Inspection
process.description: We inspect all wiring, outlets, and the panel to identify issues and plan the rewiring.

process.title: Phased Installation
process.description: We rewire room by room to minimize disruption, running new cables and installing modern outlets and switches.

process.title: Final Testing & Cleanup
process.description: All circuits are tested for safety and performance. We patch any access holes and leave your home clean.

faqs.question: How long does a whole-home rewiring take?
faqs.answer: Typically 3-7 days depending on home size. We'll provide a detailed timeline upfront.

faqs.question: Do I need to move out during rewiring?
faqs.answer: Not necessarily. We work in sections so you can stay in unaffected areas. We'll discuss your situation.

services.title: Lighting Installation & Design
services.shortDescription: Professional lighting installation for indoor and outdoor spaces, including custom designs and energy-efficient options.
services.longDescription: Great lighting transforms your space. Whether you want to brighten a kitchen, add ambiance to a living room, or illuminate your landscape, our electricians handle everything from fixture installation to custom design. We offer LED retrofits, recessed lighting, chandeliers, and outdoor security lights to enhance beauty, safety, and efficiency.
benefits: Improved home security with outdoor lighting
Expert installation ensures safety and longevity

process.title: Consultation & Design
process.description: We discuss your vision, assess the space, and recommend fixtures and placement for optimal effect.

process.title: Fixture Selection & Preparation
process.description: We help you choose fixtures or work with yours, then prepare wiring and mounting points.

process.title: Installation & Testing
process.description: Our electricians install all fixtures, connect wiring, and test every light for proper operation.

faqs.question: Can you install dimmer switches with any light?
faqs.answer: Most LEDs and incandescents work with dimmers, but we'll ensure compatibility. We recommend compatible dimmers for smooth operation.

faqs.question: Do you offer landscape lighting installation?
faqs.answer: Yes! We install low-voltage landscape lighting, including path lights, spotlights, and deck lighting.

services.title: Emergency Electrical Repairs
services.shortDescription: 24/7 emergency electrical repair services for urgent issues like outages, sparking, or exposed wires.
services.longDescription: Electrical emergencies can happen anytime. Whether it's a power outage, sparking outlet, or exposed wire, our team is ready to respond quickly. We prioritize safety and restore your power with minimal downtime. Our trucks are stocked with common parts to handle most repairs on the first visit.
benefits: Fast response times, often within one hour
Licensed technicians handle hazardous situations safely
Transparent pricing with no overtime markup
Peace of mind knowing help is available 24/7

process.title: Emergency Call
process.description: Call our 24/7 line. We'll ask about the issue and dispatch a technician immediately.

process.title: On-Site Assessment
process.description: Our electrician arrives, assesses the hazard, and takes steps to secure the area.

process.title: Repair & Restoration
process.description: We fix the issue, test the system, and ensure everything is safe before leaving.

faqs.question: What qualifies as an electrical emergency?
faqs.answer: Any situation that poses an immediate safety risk: sparking outlets, exposed wires, burning smells, or total power loss.

faqs.question: How much does an emergency call cost?
faqs.answer: We offer flat-rate emergency pricing with no hidden fees. Call for a quote before we arrive.

about.headline: Dallas's Trusted Electrical Experts
about.mission: To provide safe, reliable, and affordable electrical services that exceed customer expectations.
story: Full Service Electrician Contractors was founded on the belief that every home and business deserves top-quality electrical work. Starting with a single truck and a commitment to craftsmanship, we've grown into a trusted name across Dallas. Our team brings decades of combined experience, from new construction to historic home rewiring.

We invest in ongoing training and the latest tools to ensure every job meets the highest standards. But what truly sets us apart is our dedication to customer service. We treat every property like our own, communicating clearly, respecting your time, and leaving the workspace clean. Whether it's a simple repair or a complex installation, we approach it with the same level of care.

coreValues.title: Safety First
coreValues.description: We never compromise on safety. Every job follows strict protocols to protect you and your property.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: Honest pricing, transparent communication, and doing what we say we'll do.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: Pride in our work shows in every wire, connection, and finish.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're proud to serve Dallas and give back through local partnerships and free safety inspections.

contact.headline: Contact Us Today
contact.subheadline: Ready to start your project? Call or fill out the form for a free estimate. We typically respond within 24 hours.
